name: ask-codex
description: OpenAI Codex CLI integration for Claude Code. Wraps `codex exec` and `codex resume` with model selection (gpt-5.4 / gpt-5.3-codex / gpt-5.4-nano), reasoning effort control (high/medium/low), sandbox modes (read-only / workspace-write / danger-full-access), session resumption, and stderr suppression for thinking tokens. Requires the `codex` binary on PATH.
